name: vela
description: TypeScript-first GUI framework: WebView UI, Qt-class composition, system materials & capabilities (Bun = toolchain + desktop reference host)

scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @vela/api typecheck && bun run --filter @vela/shell-core typecheck && bun run --filter @vela/host-core typecheck && bun run --filter @vela/sys-desktop typecheck && bun run --filter @vela/plugin-notify typecheck && bun run --filter @vela/plugin-tray typecheck && bun run --filter @vela/plugin-dialog typecheck
scripts.test: bun test packages/api packages/shell-core packages/host-core packages/sys-desktop plugins/notify plugins/tray plugins/dialog
